title: ballota rupestris
intro: Ballota rupestris, also known as Rock Mint, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, relieving respiratory problems, and reducing fever, making it a popular remedy in folk medicine. Rock Mint can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function, alleviate menstrual cramps, and promote overall well-being.
